text:
Luonton City (, Ruonton-shi) is a city located in the Republic of East Gorteau. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 22, Chapter 235 

Overview

Luonton City is the only place Killua went to that did not adhere to his warning. 

Plot

Chimera Ant arc

Neferpitou contacts Leol to have him set up an ambush north of Luonton City to deal with the "Target", which is all based on a hunch they had. 

Meanwhile, Killua's warning to the people in Luonton City is not adhered to, so he decides to quit warning people about the genocide and shifts his focus to taking out militants and puppets he encounters. Killua's movement is tracked by Flutter as he reports his discovery to Leol that he's heading northward into the forest by the highway northeast of Luonton City.
